nodes.name: sample_hawkes_event_trajectory
nodes.description: Simulates a Hawkes point-process realization over a finite horizon using the provided base intensity and excitation/decay parameters.
nodes.type_signature: (mu: float, alpha: float, beta: float, T: float) -> np.ndarray
nodes.conceptual_summary: Direct callable atom in the consolidated module.
nodes.critic_notes: Signature derived from the Python wrapper definition.

nodes.name: hawkesprocesssimulator
nodes.description: Simulates a univariate Hawkes self-exciting point process over the interval [0, T] using Ogata's thinning algorithm. Given baseline intensity mu, excitation amplitude alpha, and exponential decay rate beta, draws stochastic event times whose conditional intensity is λ(t) = μ + Σᵢ α·exp(−β(t−tᵢ)) for all past events tᵢ < t. Returns the full realisation as an array of arrival times.
nodes.type_signature: (mu: float, alpha: float, beta: float, T: float) -> np.ndarray
nodes.conceptual_summary: Direct callable atom in the consolidated module.
nodes.critic_notes: Signature derived from the Python wrapper definition.
